reviews.review_description: If U don't wanna buy dragon fist then this is an okay alternative

reviews.review_title: Not a good game in my opinion
reviews.review_description: The combat feels wonky and the quality is also not good after testing most moves  and playing a match it was not in my interest at alll I expected something like when I hit them it would slide they body a lil bit to where punched them but no nothing like it all so i don’t suggest the game

Really nice combat game. It is very good for learning combat and stay fit.  It is also very cool that you have specials! I like that you have to aim your strikes and follow combat strategy to win. If you try just to throw punchs without avoiding opponent arms you won't win as all your strikes will be blocked. Attack unprotected areas of the opponent, make counter attacks and use wisely special and stamina...
Totally recommended!
demo says purchased but won't let me install. weird applab bug but won't hold it against the dev

developer_response.body: Thaks for let us know. We'll contact Meta with your case and give you feedback us soon as we have some more info. In the mean time, some other people with a similar problem told us that they found the game in the App Library of the Oculus Quest and could install it from there. Let us know if this works for you

reviews.review_description:
Great character models 

Close to real feeling of being in an actual fight bar the adrenaline dump but if you're new to VR it's gonna freak u out in the very best way 

Great workout & good way to learn some real defence & attack techniques without leaving your living room 

Street fighter in VR what more can I say 

Great work will be buying the full version

The physical combat is okay.
The audio design needs to improve to get the feel of combat.

The special moves and the artstyle are the selling point.

I also hope your team can add full body IK, and remove the limit on kicks.
The quality is bad they spam push you if you no what I mean so 2 stars

reviews.review_title: Goud gam I luced tha gam cuz it waz fuun

reviews.review_description:
If you are trying to find a good combat game with good combos and powers and it’s FREE then you should get this game it’s fun it’s a workout and you can challenge yourself
If you like fighting games you should definitely try this one out 👍

reviews.review_title: Best mortal kombat like fighter game
reviews.review_description: I think the game will become really cool when the full version comes and mabye they might add fatalities to the game cuz that would make it way way cooler

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We continue adding new features and improving the game, we take note of your proposed feature. If you like to try the full version you can find at quest store following this link https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/9026710184066320/
